title: tortoiseshell tortoisesmell
description: adds one more cat texture! (the most important one)
body:
### FEATURES:
- super lightweight resourcepack (literally 1 texture :p )
  
- rename a **calico** "honey" to make it a better cat (remember that it must be a **calico** to work)
  - _(although you can change this by editing the two file names "calico.properties" and "calico2.png" to your desired cat breed - a list of the correct IDs can be found [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cat#Appearance:~:text=minecraft%3A-,calico,-Jellie))_
  
- requires either **OptiFine** or **Entity Texture Features**!! (important!)

** **
the name is not my tortie's name nooo no no not at all not her (she's the best)

![honey pretty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4513e6eb4ad2c6757c4d5c44cfc869ea82b12f6d.jpeg)

look at her with the honey coloured fur
